title: Quest 35349 Stainless Steel Electric Kettle / 1.7 Litre - 6 Cups/Fast Boiling / 3000W / Pop Up Stainless Steel Lid/Cord Storage/Anti-Limescale Filter/Easy Clean/Strix Controller
features: FAST BOIL STAINLESS STEEL KETTLE – Stylish and functional, this stainless-steel kettle will look great in any kitchen. With a 1.7 litre capacity cordless jug and 3000W power for fast boiling, this kettle is big enough to make up to six cups at once, making it a great choice for family homes or offices – perfect for everyday use.

DURABLE AND EASY CLEAN – This kettle has a full stainless-steel interior and exterior which keeps boiled water hot for longer, wipes down easily and resists denting, rusting and discoloration. With the kettle’s water level gauge, you can easily see and measure how much water you are putting in the kettle while filling it to avoid waste.

CORD STORAGE – The kettle base includes handy cord storage to keep your worktops tidy and fuss-free. With dual water level indicator windows, you can easily see and measure how much water you are putting in the kettle while filling it to avoid waste.

ANTI-LIMESCALE FILTER – The slide-out, washable filter makes the kettle easy to clean and maintain, keeping it working to its highest performance. It also has a push button hinged lid for easy filling, a convenient illuminated power indicator, and automatic cut off for safety.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description 1.7 Litre Capacity Rapid Boil Stainless Steel Kettle Enjoy a cup of tea in no time at all using this 3000W Rapid Boil Kettle, which can boil cups of water in just one minute. The kettle's modern stainless steel design makes it a stylish addition to any kitchen, as well as ensuring an easy cleaning process. Built for convenience, the kettle's base also has built-in cord storage, and the removable filter is designed to prevent limescale. Previous page Rapid Boil Kettle With 3000W of power, the kettle can boil several cups of water in roughly one minute. Quick Release Lid The button on the kettle's handle allows you to quickly and securely release the lid for filling. Water Level Indicator The kettle's transparent water level gauge helps to precisely measure water, helping to avoid waste. 1.7 Litre Capacity The kettle has space for 1.7 litres of water, allowing it to boil up to 6 cups at once. LED Indicator Light The power switch conveniently illuminates when active, so you know when boiling is in progress. Next page 1 Rapid Boil Kettle 2 Quick Release Lid 3 Water Level Indicator 4 1.7 Litre Capacity 5 LED Indicator Light
